title: Spicy Seafood Tagine Recipe
description: A hearty North African-inspired dish made with seafood, spices, and aromatic ingredients. This tagine recipe is a flavorful and comforting meal for any occasion.

ingredients.name: Mixed seafood (such as shrimp, mussels, and clams)
Egyptian mix spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern grocery stores

instructions: Heat the oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the mixed seafood, Egyptian mix spice blend, and roasted red pepper. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add the salt, black pepper, and lemon juice. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover the tagine and cook for 10-15 minutes, or until the seafood is cooked through.
Stir in the parsley and cilantro. Serve hot over couscous or rice.
Garnish with additional parsley and cilantro, if desired.
